authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Robinson Creek: U.S. Forest Service boundary downstream to Upper Twin Lake
reaches.fromDesc: U.S. Forest Service (Humboldt-Toiyabe National Forest) boundary above Mono Village
reaches.toDesc: Inlet of Upper Twin Lake near Mono Village

reaches.name: Robinson Creek: between Upper Twin Lake and Lower Twin Lake

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(118) — Robinson Creek (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: (118) Robinson Creek (Mono Co.). (A) From the U.S. Forest Service boundary downstream to Upper Twin Lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 5 trout (B) Between Upper and Lower Twin Lakes. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 5 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R6 Mono Robinson Creek Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take April-November

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 253596, "Robinson Creek", Stream, Mono Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":253596,"gaz_name":"Robinson Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono"}; geometry multipoint with 3 vertices; first vertex (Web Mercator -13275084.4701, 4617982.0648) converts to lon -119.252113, lat 38.272425 — near this creek's mouth at Bridgeport Reservoir (gaz_id 254662, -119.227611, 38.292219), ~3.6km upstream of the reservoir; the most upstream vertex (Web Mercator -13295463.0631, 4599919.0188) converts to lon -119.435177, lat 38.144924, near the USFS boundary above Twin Lakes/Mono Village (cf. USFS Lower Twin Lake Campground, 38.170191, -119.323509). Corrects the file's prior coordinate (-119.38, 38.578), which was roughly 35km north of the actual creek and not traceable to any GNIS record or other authoritative source.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30, from the USFS boundary downstream to Upper Twin Lake
regulations.verbatimText: From the U.S. Forest Service boundary downstream to Upper Twin Lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: Daily bag and possession limit of 5 trout, in any combination of species.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30, on the segment between Upper and Lower Twin Lakes
regulations.verbatimText: Between Upper and Lower Twin Lakes. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: Daily bag and possession limit of 5 trout, in any combination of species.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Robinson Creek (Region 6, Mono Co.) as a Put and Take water stocked with catchable-size (approx. 7-12 in) Rainbow Trout, release month range April-November. This is a provisional annual plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.
